1.title: Last successful logons
1.canonicalKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4624 and LogonType == 2
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 10
1.rewrittenKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z')
| where EventID == 4624 and LogonType == 2
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 10

4.title: Failed logons by account, exclude machines
4.canonicalKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize Failures = count() by Account
| where Failures >= 5
| order by Failures desc
4.rewrittenKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z') and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize Failures = count() by Account
| where Failures >= 5
| order by Failures desc

5.title: Devices that ran chrome.exe
5.canonicalKql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "chrome.exe"
| distinct DeviceName
5.rewrittenKql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z')
| where FileName =~ "chrome.exe"
| distinct DeviceName

7.title: 5-minute timeline of failed logons
7.canonicalKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h) and EventID == 4625
| summarize Failures = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T07:52:40.000Z') and EventID == 4625
| summarize Failures = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

8.title: Top devices by process volume
8.canonicalKql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Events = count() by DeviceName
| top 5 by Events desc

DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z')
| summarize Events = count() by DeviceName
| top 5 by Events desc

10.canonicalKql:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and RemoteIPType == "Public"
| distinct RemoteIP
| order by RemoteIP asc
10.rewrittenKql:
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z') and RemoteIPType == "Public"

| order by RemoteIP asc

11.title: Brute-force candidates
11.canonicalKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    Failures  = count(),
    FirstFail = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastFail  = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Account, IpAddress
| where Failures >= 3
| order by Failures desc
11.rewrittenKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z') and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    Failures  = count(),
    FirstFail = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastFail  = max(TimeGenerated)
  by Account, IpAddress
| where Failures >= 3
| order by Failures desc

12.title: Suspicious tool execution via let-list
12.canonicalKql:
let SuspiciousTools = dynamic(["mimikatz", "rubeus", "impacket", "bloodhound"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (SuspiciousTools)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
12.rewrittenKql:
let SuspiciousTools = dynamic(["mimikatz", "rubeus", "impacket", "bloodhound"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z')
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (SuspiciousTools)
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

13.title: Most recent network info per device
13.canonicalKql:
DeviceNetworkInfo
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
13.rewrittenKql:
DeviceNetworkInfo
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-22T13:52:40.000Z')
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName

14.title: Mismatched union - BOTH
14.canonicalKql:
union
    (SecurityEvent
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and EventID == 4624
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, Source = "SecEvent"),
    (DeviceLogonEvents
        | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer = DeviceName, Account = AccountName,
                  IpAddress = RemoteIP, Source = "DefenderEDR")
| order by TimeGenerated desc
14.rewrittenKql:
union
    (SecurityEvent
        | where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z') and EventID == 4624
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, Source = "SecEvent"),
    (DeviceLogonEvents
        | where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z') and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
        | project TimeGenerated, Computer = DeviceName, Account = AccountName,
                  IpAddress = RemoteIP, Source = "DefenderEDR")
| order by TimeGenerated desc

15.title: Parse SSH failure messages
15.canonicalKql:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| extend Cleaned = replace_string(SyslogMessage, "invalid user ", "")
| parse Cleaned with "Failed password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, User, SourceIP, Port
15.rewrittenKql:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z')
| where ProcessName == "sshd-session" and SyslogMessage startswith "Failed password"
| extend Cleaned = replace_string(SyslogMessage, "invalid user ", "")
| parse Cleaned with "Failed password for " User:string " from " SourceIP:string " port " Port:int *
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, User, SourceIP, Port

16.title: Password guess then success
16.canonicalKql:
let Window = 5m;
let Fails = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
let Wins = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4624
    | project WinTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
Fails
| join kind=inner Wins on Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where WinTime > FailTime and WinTime - FailTime <= Window
| summarize
    FailCount = count(),
    FirstFail = min(FailTime),
    Success   = min(WinTime)
  by Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailCount >= 3
| order by Success desc
16.rewrittenKql:
let Window = 5m;
let Fails = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z') and EventID == 4625
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
let Wins = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z') and EventID == 4624
    | project WinTime = TimeGenerated, Account, IpAddress, Computer;
Fails
| join kind=inner Wins on Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where WinTime > FailTime and WinTime - FailTime <= Window
| summarize
    FailCount = count(),
    FirstFail = min(FailTime),
    Success   = min(WinTime)
  by Account, IpAddress, Computer
| where FailCount >= 3
| order by Success desc

17.title: Default join silently drops rows - FIX
17.canonicalKql:
let Info = DeviceNetworkInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
    | project DeviceName, IPAddresses, MacAddress;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
| join kind=leftouter (Info) on DeviceName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, IPAddresses
17.rewrittenKql:
let Info = DeviceNetworkInfo
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceName
    | project DeviceName, IPAddresses, MacAddress;
DeviceLogonEvents
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z') and ActionType == "LogonSuccess"
| join kind=leftouter (Info) on DeviceName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, IPAddresses

18.title: Cross-table correlation
18.canonicalKql:
let EncodedPS = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "EncodedCommand"
    | summarize PsCount = count() by DeviceName;
let Outbound = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess" and RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | summarize NetCount = count() by DeviceName;
EncodedPS
| join kind=inner (Outbound) on DeviceName
| project DeviceName, PsCount, NetCount
18.rewrittenKql:
let EncodedPS = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z')
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "EncodedCommand"
    | summarize PsCount = count() by DeviceName;
let Outbound = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z')
    | where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess" and RemoteIPType == "Public"
    | summarize NetCount = count() by DeviceName;
EncodedPS
| join kind=inner (Outbound) on DeviceName
| project DeviceName, PsCount, NetCount

19.title: Severity buckets with case()
19.canonicalKql:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend Band = case(
    SeverityLevel in ("info", "notice"),                "low",
    SeverityLevel == "warning",                          "medium",
    SeverityLevel in ("err", "crit", "alert", "emerg"), "high",
    "unknown")
| summarize Events = count() by Computer, Band
| order by Computer asc, Band asc
19.rewrittenKql:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z')
| extend Band = case(
    SeverityLevel in ("info", "notice"),                "low",
    SeverityLevel == "warning",                          "medium",
    SeverityLevel in ("err", "crit", "alert", "emerg"), "high",
    "unknown")
| summarize Events = count() by Computer, Band
| order by Computer asc, Band asc

21.title: First-time-seen process hash
21.canonicalKql:
let Baseline = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FileName, SHA256;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FileName, SHA256
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, SHA256, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
21.rewrittenKql:
let Baseline = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (todatetime('2026-03-30T13:52:40.000Z') .. todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z'))
    | distinct DeviceName, FileName, SHA256;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z')
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FileName, SHA256
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, SHA256, ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

22.title: Long base64-ish tokens in PowerShell
22.canonicalKql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe"
| extend Tokens = split(ProcessCommandLine, " ")
| mv-expand Token = Tokens
| where tostring(Token) matches regex @"^[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{100,}$"
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, Token = tostring(Token), ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
22.rewrittenKql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z')
| where FileName =~ "powershell.exe"
| extend Tokens = split(ProcessCommandLine, " ")
| mv-expand Token = Tokens
| where tostring(Token) matches regex @"^[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{100,}$"
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, Token = tostring(Token), ProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc

24.title: Incidents containing a given alert
rows: Brute force followed by suspicious execution
24.canonicalKql:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| mv-expand AlertId = AlertIds
| where tostring(AlertId) == "alert-002"
| project IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, AlertIds
24.rewrittenKql:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-22T13:52:40.000Z')
| mv-expand AlertId = AlertIds
| where tostring(AlertId) == "alert-002"
| project IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, AlertIds

25.title: Hourly success/failure counts side by side
25.canonicalKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| where EventID in (4624, 4625)
| summarize
    Successes = countif(EventID == 4624),
    Failures  = countif(EventID == 4625)
  by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by Computer asc, TimeGenerated asc
25.rewrittenKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z')
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| where EventID in (4624, 4625)
| summarize
    Successes = countif(EventID == 4624),
    Failures  = countif(EventID == 4625)
  by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by Computer asc, TimeGenerated asc

28.title: Password spray
28.canonicalKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    DistinctAccounts = dcount(Account),
    SampleAccounts   = make_set(Account, 10)
  by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DistinctAccounts >= 3
| order by DistinctAccounts desc
28.rewrittenKql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-28T13:52:40.000Z') and EventID == 4625
| where Account !endswith "$" and isnotempty(Account)
| summarize
    DistinctAccounts = dcount(Account),
    SampleAccounts   = make_set(Account, 10)
  by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DistinctAccounts >= 3
| order by DistinctAccounts desc

29.title: First-seen file path on a device today
29.canonicalKql:
let Baseline = DeviceFileEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. ago(1h))
    | distinct DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where ActionType == "FileCreated"
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
29.rewrittenKql:
let Baseline = DeviceFileEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (todatetime('2026-04-22T13:52:40.000Z') .. todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z'))
    | distinct DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName;
DeviceFileEvents
| where TimeGenerated > todatetime('2026-04-29T12:52:40.000Z')
| where ActionType == "FileCreated"
| join kind=leftanti (Baseline) on DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FolderPath, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
